methods.name: withdraw
methods.desc: Withdraw funds from the contract to the admin.

methods.name: deleteBoxes

args.name: boxKeys
args.desc: Array of 4-byte box keys to delete.

methods.desc: Delete app registry boxes by their keys.

methods.name: register

args.name: appId
args.desc: App ID of the application to register. The app address derived from this ID will be registered in the contract and can be retrieved later.

methods.desc: Register a single application escrow account

methods.name: registerList

args.name: appIds
args.desc: Array of App IDs to register. The app addresses derived from these IDs will be registered in the contract and can be retrieved later.

methods.desc: Register multiple application escrow accounts in a single transaction. This is more efficient than calling register multiple times as the MBR cost can be paid for in a single payment and the app IDs can be stored more efficiently in the contract state.

methods.name: exists

returns.desc: boolean indicating whether the given address is registered in the contract

methods.desc: Return true if an app escrow account exists for the given address, false otherwise.

methods.name: get

args.name: address
args.desc: App Escrow to get the app ID for

returns.desc: App ID for the given address, or 0 if not registered

methods.desc: Get the app ID for the given app escrow address. Returns 0 if the app escrow is not registered in the contract.

methods.name: mustGet

args.name: address
args.desc: App Escrow to get the app ID for

returns.desc: App ID for the given address

methods.desc: Get the app ID for the given app escrow address. Throws an error if the app escrow is not registered in the contract.

methods.name: getWithAuth

args.name: address
args.desc: App Escrow to get the app ID for, along with its auth address

returns.desc: [app ID for the given address, app ID for the auth address], or 0 for each if not registered

methods.desc: Get the app ID for the given app escrow address and its auth address. Returns 0 for each if not registered in the contract.

methods.name: getWithAuthList

args.name: addresses
args.desc: App Escrows to get the app IDs for, along with their auth addresses

returns.desc: Array of [app ID for the given address, app ID for the auth address] for each input address, or 0 for each if not registered

methods.desc: Get the app ID for multiple app escrow addresses and their auth addresses. Returns 0 for each if not registered in the contract.

methods.name: getList

args.name: addresses
args.desc: App Escrows to get the app IDs for

returns.desc: Array of app IDs for each input address, or 0 if not registered

methods.desc: Get the app IDs for multiple app escrow addresses. Returns 0 for each if not registered in the contract.

methods.name: mustGetList

args.name: addresses
args.desc: App Escrows to get the app IDs for

returns.desc: Array of app IDs for each input address

methods.desc: Get the app IDs for multiple app escrow addresses. Throws an error if any of the app escrows are not registered in the contract.

methods.name: increaseBudget
methods.desc: Utility for explicitly increasing the budget of a transaction group by performing no-op inner transactions.

methods.name: depositCredits

args.name: txn
args.desc: payment transaction to contract. amount is the credit received

methods.desc: public method to deposit MBR credits for an account

methods.name: withdrawCredits
methods.desc: Withdraw all remaining MBR credits for sender. This will delete the user credit box, so all credits are withdrawn including the MBR locked for the box itself.

counter.desc: Counter for the number of registered applications

apps.desc: BoxMap from 4-byte prefix of escrow to app IDs
